calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cynthia Stott, a/k/a Cynthia A. Stott.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discovery Bank.
No Appearance by defendant Cynthia Stott, a/k/a Cynthia A. Stott.
Plaintiff's complaint for Collections/Common Counts was filed on May 14, 2018.
Defendant Cynthia Stott, a/k/a Cynthia A. Stott's, General Denial was filed on November 29, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on January, 17, 2019, setting trial for June 3, 2019.
Re-Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on June 4, 2019, setting trial for today, June 10, 2019.
Declaration of Evin Culp in Lieu of Live Testimony Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 was served on defendant Cynthia Stott, a/k/a Cynthia A. Stott, on February 26, 2019.
Order on Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Facts as Admitted was filed on May 13, 2019.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, June 10, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, June 10, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Cynthia Stott, a/k/a Cynthia A. Stott, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $3,157.96.
Costs - $544.00.
Total - $3,701.96.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Jun-10-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Jackson, esq. (707-318-2994) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued, Counsel presents proposed order. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted:

The motion is GRANTED, each identified request for admission is deemed admitted. No opposition filed. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $260.00, payable within 30 days.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
